hooks.command: f=$(uv run python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); case "$f" in *AppDatabase.kt*|*/core-data/schemas/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Room migration file — confirm a new migration block is written and schema export is planned."}}' ;; esac
